one_liner: AI-powered meeting transcription and note-taking service with automated summaries, action items, and speaker identification.

auth_methods.notes: Bearer token authentication using API keys generated from the Developer tab in account settings
OAuth 2.0 available for Enterprise accounts requiring client credentials from account manager. Used for the MCP server integration.

self_serve_notes: The Public API is restricted to Enterprise plan workspaces only. Not available on free Basic tier or individual Pro/Business subscriptions. Organizations must contact sales team for custom pricing and Enterprise contract setup before API access is granted.

api_surface.notes: REST API with endpoints for channels, conversations, transcripts, audio, action items, insights, outlines, and workspace details. Also supports webhooks for real-time notifications. Includes cursor-based pagination.

main_blocker: API access requires Enterprise plan with sales contact - not self-serve accessible for developers

evidence.supports: API documentation showing Bearer token auth, Enterprise-only access, rate limits of 10 req/sec, and endpoints for channels, conversations, transcripts, action items
Official MCP server endpoint with OAuth authentication for AI assistants to access meeting transcripts
Third-party documentation repository confirming API existence and structure
